title: The Coir Industry (Registration) Amendment Rules, 2009.

WWI Thgf zi d1N fc9. * 1:117 atimr f9TRTO " -krk' t AffffelifErff 151541 ,M 1,1,1 111 I d eR1 1:1 61 .11,51(41 *f977:11 22 "fABwr fffuizr 3-ifm4 T*I*1:21f9 1:11 tft 3-r9Te *-1.Wft-4 1-7* 41-dc aiicbr fweru liT-4 1-19-1-dwrrtm fir [TR 6(25 )2000-1,91 (41-ffP4-11 )1 Y)4 44;411 ^fr791rhi, t-itrct Ttfffi fecIVIT ittt-acto1 aT.3,1T. 2061 (31), lc-4w 18 31TRRI, 2008 TIt'arrI (4-17 0494, 3314114117, WT1-1I, (is 3, 34-/4g (ii) 4 wham f*7 MINISTRY OF MICRO, SMALL AND MEDIUM ENTERPRISES NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 26th November, 2009 S.O. 3016(E).—Whereas the draft of certain Rules to amend the Coir Industry (Registration) Rules, 2008. was published as required by sub-section (I) of section 26 of the Coir Industry Act, 1953 (45 of 1953) in the notification of Government of India in the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises number S.0.2086 (E), dated llth August, 2009 inviting objections and suggestions from all persons likely to be affected thereby and notice was given that the said draft shall be taken into consideration after the expiry of a period of 45 days from the date of publication in the Official Gazette. And whereas, no objection or suggestion has been received from the public on the said draft within the said period. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (I) of section 26 of the Coir Industry Act, the Central Government hereby makes the following rules to amend the Coir Industry (Registration) Rules. 2008, namely :-- RULES I. (I) These rules may be called the Coir Industry (Re gistration) Amendment Rules. 2009. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. In the Coir Industry (Registration) Rules, 2008, (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in rule 4, in the proviso, for the words "entertain an application", the words "by order and for reasons to be recorded in writing, entertain an application" shall be substituted. In rule 7 of the said rules, in the first proviso and second proviso for the words "entertain an application-, the words "by order and for reasons to be recorded in writing, entertain an application" shall be substituted. In rule 14 of the said rules, for the words "whose decision thereon shall be final", the words "who shall dispose of the appeal within thirty days from the date of receipt of such appeal" shall be substituted. In rule 22 of the said rules, for the words "whose decision thereon shall be final", the words "who shall dispose of the appeal within ninety days from the date of receipt of such appeal" shall be substituted. [ENG. 6 (25)/2000-Coir (Vol. II)] SESH KUMAR PULIPAKA, it. Secy. Note : The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3. Sub-section (ii) vide 5.0. 2061 (E), dated the 18th August, 2008. Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
